title: Sopron、Győr-Moson-Sopron — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Sopron、Győr-Moson-Sopronの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

SopronはGyőr-Moson-Sopronにある人口62,671の都市です。The most loyal city, known for its 1921 referendum to stay with Hungary, a beautifully preserved medieval old town, and the surrounding Sopron wine region.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
